title: Munich Court Rules Netflix Is Infringing Broadcom Video Patent; Imposes Injunction
text: SAN JOSE, Calif., Sept. 25, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Broadcom Inc. The court issued an injunction requiring Netflix to cease and desist all further infringement in Germany.
